name: research-dossier
stop_condition: Build the evidence matrix, audit citation integrity, run the mandatory source-repair pass, gather one parallel critique round, then synthesize a dossier that keeps contamination visible.

turns.name: evidence-matrix
turns.instruction: Build a source-backed evidence matrix for the requested investigation. For every shortlisted item include category, support/applicability, deployment or operating model, data exposure or trust boundary, integration surface, cost/licensing caveat when relevant, source URL or explicit unknown, and confidence. Separate confirmed facts, inferences, assumptions, and open questions. Do not recommend yet.

turns.name: source-audit
turns.instruction: Audit the evidence matrix. Verify that every claim is attributed to the correct subject and a real supporting source; flag misattributed or cross-contaminated citations, weak or stale claims, missing official sources, and unknowns that were filled with confident prose. End with a line that is exactly `CITATION_INTEGRITY: PASS` or `CITATION_INTEGRITY: FAIL`, followed by each contaminated claim as `claim -> wrong source/subject -> correct subject`.

turns.name: source-repair
turns.instruction: Repair the evidence matrix using the source audit. On `CITATION_INTEGRITY: FAIL`, re-attribute every flagged claim to its correct subject and source, mark unverifiable claims `unknown`, rebuild the affected rows, and write a `Citation Corrections` log. On `PASS`, state that no repair was required and restate the verified key sources.

turns.name: enterprise-critique
turns.instruction: Critique the repaired dossier as an enterprise decision artifact. Focus on risk, cost, operating model, adoption failure modes, data exposure, decision gates, and what could go wrong if the organization acts on the current evidence.

turns.name: clarity-critique
turns.instruction: Critique the repaired dossier for clarity, overreach, unresolved unknowns, and where the recommendation is stronger than the evidence supports. Call out what still needs verification before a purchase or rollout decision.

final.name: final-dossier
final.instruction: Produce the final Markdown dossier for the user from the repaired evidence matrix and both critiques. Include Executive Summary, Evidence Summary, Recommendation, Shortlist With Confidence, Citation Integrity & Corrections, Unknowns, Decision Gates, What To Verify Next, and Patch Or Instructions. Keep contamination visible; if a flagged citation was not repaired, lower confidence and say so explicitly.
